rulings.Case Title: CHUZHOY VS CHU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement; Decl Of Jeffry Glenn;Mp&As
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF HANDWRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS GRANTED CONTINGENT UPON PLAINTIFF DRAFTING A PROPOSED FORM OF JUDGMENT AGAINST EACH OF DEFENDANTS AND SERVING EACH WITH A COPY OF THIS ORDER AND THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS SHALL BE SERVED BY PERSONAL DELIVERY AND EACH SHALL HAVE FIVE DAYS FROM THE DATE OF SERVICE TO STATE ANY REASONS FOR DISAPPROVAL BY SERVING THEM IN WRITING ON PLAINTIFFS. FAILURE TO NOTIFY THE PLAINTIFFS WITHIN THE TIME REQUIRED SHALL BE DEEMED AN APPROVAL. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. (JH)
